# hetzner_wol (Data Source)

Read Wake on LAN availability for a Hetzner dedicated server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_wol" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) The server number.

### Read-Only

- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network.
